# Quick check - did anything change besides timer?
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

def summarize(seg):
    summary = {}
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        key = (n['color'], n['pixels'])
        summary[key] = summary.get(key, 0) + 1
    return summary

print("Before:", summarize(before))
print("After:", summarize(after))
print("Same?", summarize(before) == summarize(after))
</parameter>
</function>
